description: System diagnostic: collect OS, CPU, RAM, disk, network info
command_preview:
import platform, os, socket
print('=' * 50)
print('  SYSTEM DIAGNOSTIC REPORT')
print('=' * 50)
print()
print('[OS]')
print('  System   :', platform.system())
print('  Release  :', platform.release())
print('  Version  :', platform.version())
print('  Machine  :', platform.machine())
print('  Processor:', platform.processor())
print()
print('[USER]')
print('  Username :', os.getlogin())
print('  Home     :', os.path.expanduser('~'))
print('  CWD      :', os.getcwd())
print()
print('[NETWORK]')
p
